title: Item Split Bugfix
description: Fixing item split bug in any modpacks
body:
This mod fixes an issue where some items stop stacking properly due to unnecessary data attached by other mods.
It removes empty tags that prevent identical items from stacking, making your inventory clean and consistent again.
No configuration required. Just install and play.


_**It`s a Fabric port of this mod - [Item Split Bug Fix](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/item-split-bug-fix/files/all?page=1) by [iwaliner](https://www.curseforge.com/members/iwaliner/projects)**_
